name: Lucky Cement Corporation
summary: Lucky Cement Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells cement in the People's Republic of China. The company offers Portland cement, ready mix concrete, hot cement, low-alkali Portland cement, slag powder, limestone, specification stones, and gravels, as well as ashes. It also engages in construction business; and provides shipping agent and transportation services. In addition, the company is involved in the sale and lease of residential and commercial buildings, parking lots, and industrial areas; and investment, cement trading, and gravel mining businesses. Lucky Cement Corporation was founded in 1974 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.
